title: IAMMAI Validation Artifact
description: First bounded schema for validation artifacts that preserve condition checking as typed trace without becoming governance, semantic source, or standing-state creation.

validation_id.description: Stable identifier for the validation artifact.

target_ref.description: Reference to the matter, state, transition, or artifact against which conditions were checked.

outcome.description: Bounded result of the condition check. This does not by itself imply authorization, standing-state creation, or governance force.

checked_at.description: Time at which the validation check occurred.

condition_set_ref.description: Reference to the condition set or rule reference used for the validation.

reason_refs.description: Optional bounded reason references associated with the outcome.

actor_ref.description: Optional reference to the actor associated with the validation event where attribution is preserved.

scope_ref.description: Optional bounded scope reference for the validation context.

related_witness_ref.description: Optional reference to a related witness artifact.

related_transition_ref.description: Optional reference to a related transition record.

related_governance_action_ref.description: Optional reference to a related governance action record.
